what_it_does: Records a channel-memory attachment entry that links an item in the design-assets channel to a specific image asset via a target URI and timestamp.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter with no body content.
standouts: The target URI contains spaces and parentheses: image://design-assets/icons/image (42).
It is a typed image attachment in the design-assets channel.
conventions: Fields include id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added.
Acts as a neutral ledger-style record.
concerns: The target string has spaces and parentheses, which may be a literal filename or a parsing hazard.
No checksum, MIME type, file size, or uploader is recorded.
No message or entity id indicates what owns this attachment.
notes: This is a minimal attachment ledger record that maps a design-assets channel item to an image file named 'image (42)'.
questions: What message or record owns this attachment?
Is 'image (42)' a literal filename or a generated placeholder?
Is the image:// URI scheme resolvable by the system?
Why does the target contain parentheses and a space?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose as an attachment metadata record matches the content: it records an image attachment target and addition time.
intention_signals: It appears to create a durable, queryable ledger entry associating a channel memory record with a specific image asset for later retrieval or audit.
novelty: The image:// URI target containing a parenthetical filename with spaces is slightly unusual for a canonical asset reference.
contribution: Contributes a concrete typed attachment reference within the design-assets channel, including a target URI and creation timestamp that a fused system can use to correlate attachments with channel assets.
summary_for_embedding: Attachment metadata record att-10b43572 in the design-assets channel links to the image asset at image://design-assets/icons/image (42) and records an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: Record that an image attachment was added to the design-assets channel at a specific time.
